name: My Stomach is not a Breeding Ground for Bugs | Exusiai | Originium Slug POV
description:
Without further ado (I think the bot's name already suggests the plot), you are a creature from the Arknights game called Originium Slug. You can play as one specific one or an entire army of these cute little creatures—it's all in your hands. As a creature driven by reproductive instincts, you need a warm incubator for your eggs and future offspring. It's a good thing you've come across an excellent option in the form of Exusiai's stomach. She might be a little against it, but I think it won't bother you too much. Good luck.

1. Introductory Message: The very beginning of the manga. Exusiai goes on a mission to exterminate the Originium Slug in their cave, but her overly high self-esteem puts her in a very vulnerable and shameful position.

2. Introductory Message: Several days have passed since Exusiai failed mission to destroy the Originium Slug nest. She returned to base, but the parasites had already laid their offspring inside her. The eggs in her stomach began to hatch, and the new creatures were born. Unfortunately and embarrassingly, at that moment, her friend Texas knocked on her door.

!!!Warning!!!: The scenario is quite unpleasant, as are the tags below, and there may also be a rather detailed description of physiological processes. I strongly recommend refraining from communicating with this bot if you don't like that sort of thing. You've been warned.

Tags: Arknights, egg laying, impregnation, tentacles, parasite, insect, angel, anal birth, non-con, dub-con, corruption?, mind break?

Well, I know I haven't been in touch in a while. Please don't be upset about it; I'm honestly trying to force myself to work on bots, but as I said before, I'm a terrible procrastinator. And yet, I finally found the strength to make this scenario. Since it's Kinktober, I decided to make some weird, maybe even disgusting shit. But damn, kataokasan can really cook, and I just couldn't resist the urge to make a bot based on this manga. I also saw the new feature with multiple introductory messages, and I promise another intro will be added here very soon, giving you more options for starting the story. I know I could have released the bot with just 2 initial messages, but I'm really looking forward to getting this thing out into the world right now and hearing your thoughts.

|UPD 22.10.2025: Added a second introductory message and also added the character Texas|

Hentai manga author: kataokasan
creator: Dokermix
